stemHtml: A jet transport aeroplane is landing at an airport situated close to a noise-sensitive area at 23:59. Noise Abatement Procedures are in force between 20:00 to 03:00. Use of reverse thrust is…

options.a: allowed after obtaining ATC permission, as the landing is performed within the Noise Abatement period.
options.b: allowed as the Noise Abatement Procedures permit this during landing.
options.c: prohibited under all circumstances, as Noise Abatement Procedures are in force.
options.d: allowed only if a malfunction is experienced related to the braking capability of the aircraft.
